WARNING: Resetting progression will clear all credits, vehicle upgrades, and best lap times. This cannot be undone.

UPGRADE SHOP

LIGHT CLASS

CREDITS: 0

Purchase vehicle upgrades to gain an edge in Single Race and League modes.

THE AXIS PROTOCOL

"The cylindrical conduits are more than tracks. They are the arteries of humanity. By racing at sub-light speeds, your kinetic friction primes the interstellar energy grid. No race, no power."

STEERING: ARROW LEFT/RIGHT or STICK

ACCELERATE: ARROW UP / BUTTON A (Build for Start Boost!)

BRAKE: ARROW DOWN / BUTTON B

SWITCH SIDE: SPACEBAR / BUTTON X (Inside/Outside)

FIRE WEAPON: Q KEY / BUTTON Y

MANUAL BOOST: W KEY / BUTTON RB (Costs Energy, After Lap 1)

REAR VIEW: E KEY (Hold)

Slipstream behind opponents to siphon kinetic wake.

Recharge your shield in the Prime Zones (Magenta).

SELECT PILOT

SELECT VEHICLE

SELECT TRACK

DIFFICULTY

LEAGUE STANDINGS

PAUSED

AXIS RUSH 2026

The Lagrange points are in turmoil. The three dominant factions—Hegemony, Underground, and Void—have gathered for the ultimate championship.

Ten tracks. Nine pilots. One Source Code. The winner takes Root Access to the Axis Grid. The losers are erased from history.
